Scream (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $81,641,405Details
International Box Office $57,233,384
Worldwide Box Office $138,874,789
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,124,194
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,021,329
Total $5,145,523
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Twenty-five years after a streak of brutal murders shocked the quiet town of Woodsboro, a new killer has donned the Ghostface mask and begins targeting a group of teenagers to resurrect secrets from the town’s deadly past.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,018,805 (36.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.72 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:58.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$24,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,664 opening theaters/3,666 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $92,728,511

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 14th, 2022 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: January 12th, 2022 (Wide) (France)
January 13th, 2022 (Wide), released as Scream 5 (Germany)
January 13th, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
January 13th, 2022 (Wide), released as Крик (Russia (CIS))
January 13th, 2022 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: March 1st, 2022 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, language throughout and some sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2709 (cert #53115), 12/1/2021)
Running Time: 114 minutes
Franchise: Scream
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel
Filming location (country): United States
Plot point: The Past Catching up with You
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Spyglass Media Group, Project X Entertainment, Paramount Pictures, Radio Silence
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
